steps.title: Use exact dimensions
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the size of the sculpture, so the most relevant notes are the concrete measurements: Cycle is roughly 62 feet wide and 56 feet tall. Those figures show scale more clearly than a general description.

steps.title: Reject non-size focus
steps.content: Choice A only says Adrian Cole is known for large sculptures. Choice C shifts to his use of metals, and Choice D only identifies weathering steel. The needed sentence foregrounds Cycle's width and height. The answer is B.
